pr.title: feat: Build full Lumira Launcher — cyberpunk GTA multiplayer launcher
pr.body: ## Summary Adds a comprehensive **README.md** with full project documentation for the Lumira Launcher — covering all features, tech stack, design system, staff roles, getting started guide, and owner information. The launcher is a cyberpunk/neon-themed GTA multiplayer app built with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, and Vite 8. It includes: - **11 pages**: Home, Server Browser, Hosting, Marketplace, Premium, Friends, Mods, Staff Panel, Owner Dashboard, Settings, Notifications - **Loading & Login screens** with animated particles and Google/Discord/Guest auth - **Full staff role system**: Owner, Community Manager, Administrator, Moderator, Helper, Premium User - **Owner dashboard** with analytics, user management, revenue tracking, and admin controls - **Cyberpunk design**: Glassmorphism, neon glow, animated particles, RGB text, Orbitron/Poppins/Sora fonts - **Owner**: Abdirahim (Abdirahima273@gmail.com) | Support: Asturacloud@gmail.com ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Run `npm install && npm run dev` and verify the loading screen animation plays - [ ] Navigate through all 11 pages via the sidebar and confirm they render correctly - [ ] Test server browser search/filter/sort functionality - [ ] Verify cyberpunk theme colors and glassmorphism effects look correct - [ ] Check the owner dashboard stats, charts, and user table ### Notes - All data is from mock data sources — no backend connected yet - Login buttons are placeholder flows (no real OAuth) - For production: needs Supabase backend, real OAuth, Electron wrapper, and multiplayer networking - Passes TypeScript type checks and ESLint lint checks Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/d885e49651d347e8a05b6967246af836 Requested by: @Bluestudio56 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
